#comment: Put universally useful LevelModule definitions here!

objdata.#Comment: All ranges are evaluated as a function of level (x = level)

UpperBound.//: Go from 3 to 4 at level 10
Start at 5. Go to 6 at level 20.  Go to 7 at level 40.
Go from 1 to 4 between levels 10 and 40

LowerBound.//: Zero for the first 30 levels, then min of one

UpperBound.//: None for the first five levels, then gradual increase every ten levels to max two
1 for the first ten levels, then increase every ten levels to max 4
5 for the first 25 levels, then gradual increase every ten levels to max 10
0 for the first 15 levels, then increase every 10 levels to 5
